segments.text: speak the things which are proper for sound doctrine
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: the older men be sober, reverent, temperate, sound in faith, in love, in patience
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: the older women likewise, that they be reverent in behavior, not slanderers, not given to much wine, teachers of good things
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: that they admonish the young women to love their husbands, to love their children
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: to be discreet, chaste, homemakers, good, obedient to their own husbands, that the word of God may not be blasphemed
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: exhort the young men to be sober-minded
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: in all things showing yourself to be a pattern of good works; in doctrine showing integrity, reverence, incorruptibility
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: sound speech that cannot be condemned, that one who is an opponent may be ashamed, having nothing evil to say of you
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Exhort bondservants to be obedient to their own masters, to be well pleasing in all things, not answering back
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: not pilfering, but showing all good fidelity, that they may adorn the doctrine of God our Savior in all things
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: the grace of God that brings salvation has appeared to all men
teaching us that, denying ungodliness and worldly lusts, we should live soberly, righteously, and godly in the present age
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: looking for the blessed hope and glorious appearing of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: who gave Himself for us, that He might redeem us from every lawless deed and purify for Himself His own special people, zealous for good works
Speak these things, exhort, and rebuke with all authority. Let no one despise you
segments.speaker: Paul
